extraction.one_line_summary: VERONA Carlos won after arguing with teammates about workload, crafted his effort while others chased, held off chase group including Roglic
tactical_patterns: Verona tactically refused to work with Fraile in break, conserved energy while others chased, demonstrates calculated non-cooperation wins stages.
Roglic appeared third overall after climb splits; showed composure dropping Haig without panic, validating Tour Slovenia form skeptics dismissed.
Movistar's Quintana sat in chase when Landa was ahead, using teammate positioning to justify not working despite losing time.

rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: positive: Controlled climb splits effortlessly despite being underestimated post-Slovenia win, moved to third overall without visible strain
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: negative: Uncharacteristically dropped when yellow jersey group split in wind, head bowed suggesting first real weakness of race
rider_signals.VERONA Carlos: positive: Won by refusing teammate cooperation requests, managed effort distribution to out-sprint chasers including GC contenders
rider_signals.GIRI: neutral: Jumped Roglic at line for bonus seconds in chase group, prioritizing stage position over yellow jersey's interests
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: negative: Used Landa's presence ahead as excuse to avoid work in chase, tactical passivity cost stage contention
